name: Wireless Headphones
description: High-quality wireless Bluetooth headphones with noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design.

name: Cotton T-Shirt
description: Premium 100% organic cotton t-shirt, available in multiple colors. Soft, breathable, and perfect for everyday wear.

name: Organic Green Tea
description: Premium organic green tea leaves, rich in antioxidants. 50 tea bags per box. Sourced from Japan.

name: JavaScript: The Good Parts
description: A must-read guide to JavaScript best practices by Douglas Crockford. Covers the elegant, well-designed parts of the language.

name: Yoga Mat
description: Non-slip, eco-friendly yoga mat with alignment lines. 6mm thickness for optimal cushioning and support.

name: Smart Watch
description: Feature-packed smartwatch with heart rate monitor, GPS tracking, sleep analysis, and 7-day battery life.
